text.tspan: Federal agencies searching Kenner's Flock cameras: 12 of 13 stopped by mid-2025
​One row per agency; dot size = searches that day. Agencies that stopped show their last search date; a red x marks the 6 accounts tagged [Inactive].​
​Only the US Postal Inspection Service (54,035 of the 64,382 federal searches) is still active when the data ends.​
​6 of the 13 accounts are tagged [Inactive] in the export; all 6 stopped searching, but so did 6 agencies without the tag.​

text.tspan: Source: Kenner LA PD FOIA response via MuckRock (Flock audit logs, Jan 2024 - Jan 16 2026). No grant/revocation events appear in Kenner's event logs;
last search dates and the [Inactive] tags in the export are the best cutoff evidence. Methodology: results/federal-access-timeline/, eos-foia-flock-kenner repo.
